text.title: Agents Memory System — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output code.

list.item: Input: Session shape, retention policy.
Action: Author Pydantic models for ShortTermBuffer, EpisodicEntry, LongTermEntry.
Output: memory/models.py.
Decision gate: If episodic is not needed for the use case, skip but document why.
Input: Summariser model + prompt.
Action: Build summarise(turns) → EpisodicEntry; run every N turns.
Output: summariser.py + tests.
Decision gate: If summarisation is expensive, batch every 20 turns instead of 10.
Input: Long-term store + BM25 index.
Action: Build recall(query, k) using hybrid scoring.
Output: recall.py + benchmark vs single-method baseline.
Decision gate: If BM25 not available, use sparse vector index (e.g., SPLADE).
Input: Episodic store.
Action: Add LRU or TTL policy; nightly cleanup job.
Output: Eviction policy active; store size bounded.
Decision gate: If store size doesn't grow, you may not need eviction yet.
Input: Recall metrics.
Action: Track (recall_precision, latency_p95, store_size); iterate.
Output: Dashboard with the three metrics.
Decision gate: If recall_precision < 0.7, return to step 3 (recall scoring).
